issue_title: fix: export GoogleSigninButtonDirective from its own module
issue_body_preview: to avoid errors when using the `GoogleSigninButtonDirective` in sub modules, it makes sense to export it from its own module. I also bumped the angular dependencies, otherwise installing the modules failed for me.
test_description_zh: 在 Angular 应用的子模块中导入 GoogleSigninButtonModule，并在该子模块的组件模板中使用 Google 登录按钮指令（GoogleSigninButtonDirective），观察按钮是否能正常渲染显示。
expected_result_zh: 在子模块中使用 GoogleSigninButtonDirective 时，不会出现模块导出错误，Google 登录按钮能够在页面上正常渲染和显示。
